intro: Poa swallenii, also known as Swallen's bluegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and support overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Poa swallenii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Poa swallenii is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
